title: uraria gracilis
intro: Uraria gracilis, also known as Kali musali or Small Indian cress, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating urinary tract infections, and alleviating symptoms of kidney stones. Uraria gracilis can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried powder, often used in Ayurvedic medicine.
